name: Payout Settings
description: Bank/payment configuration form with payout method selection, bank details, schedule settings, and payout history.

standard.description: Full payout setup with all options

visual_brief: Settings form with a payout method selector at the top (radio cards for Bank Transfer/ACH, PayPal, Stripe, with icons). Below, a details section shows the selected method's account fields (bank name, routing number, account number — masked with reveal toggle). A schedule section has radio buttons or toggles for payout frequency (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) with a next payout date indicator. A payout history list at the bottom shows recent payouts with date, amount, status, and method. The readonly preset disables all inputs and shows data in display-only mode.

responsive.mobile: Method cards stack vertically. Account fields are full-width. Schedule options stack. Payout history becomes a card list.
responsive.tablet: Method cards in a 2x2 grid. Standard form layout. History table visible.
responsive.desktop: Method cards in a single row. Account and schedule sections side by side. Full history table.

layout_hints.payout_priority: Lead with current payout method and schedule first so creators immediately understand how and when they get paid. History and deeper configuration are secondary.
layout_hints.trust_clarity: Masked account identity, next payout timing, and payout state should stay visible and calm to reinforce confidence in the setup.
layout_hints.readonly_translation: Readonly mode should preserve the same structural hierarchy as edit mode so reviewing payout settings never feels like a different component.

motion.micro: Method selection and reveal toggles may confirm state changes subtly without making financial settings feel playful.
motion.transitions: Switching payout methods or schedules should feel deliberate and trustworthy, especially around sensitive banking information.

keyboard: Method selection, account fields, schedule controls, and payout history should follow a clear top-to-bottom order.
announcements: Current payout method, schedule, and payout status should be exposed semantically so the setup remains understandable without relying on card or badge styling alone.

composition.PayoutSettings: Container(d-section, flex-col, gap-6) > [MethodSelect + BankForm + ScheduleSection + PayoutHistory?]
composition.BankForm: Section(d-surface) > [BankName(d-control) + RoutingNumber(d-control, masked) + AccountNumber(d-control, masked) + RevealToggle(d-interactive)]
